description: The TextGizmo component is commonly found on newly spawned text elements and is used to quickly edit the text of a spawned text element. This component and it's visuals delete themselves after the user selects the text element using a development tip or inspector.

fields._target: The text renderer to edit the text of.
fields._editor: The text editor Component that targets ``_target`` for its editing.
fields._editIconPosition: The position field of the start editing icon.
fields._editIconScale: The scale field of the start editing icon.

methods.EditTouched: Is called when the user wants to start editing ``_target`` via using this gizmo.
